text: Be strong and courageous. Do not be afraid...
Cast all your anxiety on him because he cares for you.
I can do all things through him who strengthens me.
For I know the plans I have for you, declares the Lord...
The Lord is my light and my salvation; whom shall I fear?
Trust in the Lord with all your heart, and do not lean on your own understanding.
Come to me, all who labor and are heavy laden, and I will give you rest.
Even though I walk through the valley of the shadow of death, I will fear no evil...
God is our refuge and strength, a very present help in trouble.
So we fix our eyes not on what is seen, but on what is unseen...
The Lord will fight for you; you need only to be still.
Rejoice in hope, be patient in tribulation, be constant in prayer.
Do not be anxious about anything, but in everything by prayer and supplication with thanksgiving let your requests be made known to God.
The steadfast love of the Lord never ceases; his mercies never come to an end.
Blessed is the man who remains steadfast under trial.
Your word is a lamp to my feet and a light to my path.
Let all that you do be done in love.
He has told you, O man, what is good; and what does the Lord require of you but to do justice, and to love kindness, and to walk humbly with your God?
In the beginning was the Word, and the Word was with God, and the Word was God.
Create in me a clean heart, O God, and renew a right spirit within me.
But seek first the kingdom of God and his righteousness, and all these things will be added to you.
Therefore, if anyone is in Christ, he is a new creation. The old has passed away; behold, the new has come.
And we know that in all things God works for the good of those who love him, who have been called according to his purpose.
The name of the Lord is a strong tower; the righteous man runs into it and is safe.
Even youths shall faint and be weary, and young men shall fall exhausted; but they who wait for the Lord shall renew their strength.
The Lord is near to the brokenhearted and saves the crushed in spirit.
Jesus Christ is the same yesterday and today and forever.
For all have sinned and fall short of the glory of God.
But God shows his love for us in that while we were still sinners, Christ died for us.
The Lord is good, a stronghold in the day of trouble; he knows those who take refuge in him.
Blessed are the peacemakers, for they shall be called sons of God.
Delight yourself in the Lord, and he will give you the desires of your heart.
He must increase, but I must decrease.
The Lord is my strength and my shield; in him my heart trusts, and I am helped.
He gives power to the faint, and to him who has no might he increases strength.
Therefore encourage one another and build one another up, just as you are doing.
Let everything that has breath praise the Lord!
And above all these put on love, which binds everything together in perfect harmony.
Whoever does not love does not know God, because God is love.
Let us not grow weary of doing good, for in due season we will reap, if we do not give up.
The Lord is slow to anger and abounding in steadfast love, forgiving iniquity and transgression.
For the Spirit God gave us does not make us timid, but gives us power, love and self-discipline.
As iron sharpens iron, so one person sharpens another.
Taste and see that the Lord is good; blessed is the one who takes refuge in him.
My grace is sufficient for you, for my power is made perfect in weakness.
A gentle answer turns away wrath, but a harsh word stirs up anger.
But the fruit of the Spirit is love, joy, peace, patience, kindness, goodness, faithfulness, gentleness, and self-control.
He will cover you with his feathers, and under his wings you will find refuge.
Do not let your hearts be troubled. Trust in God; trust also in me.
The Lord is my rock, my fortress and my deliverer.
Faith is the assurance of things hoped for, the conviction of things not seen.
Be still, and know that I am God.
Set your minds on things above, not on earthly things.
Do everything in love.
When I am afraid, I put my trust in you.
The fear of the Lord is the beginning of wisdom.
Let your light shine before others, that they may see your good deeds and glorify your Father in heaven.
For we walk by faith, not by sight.
The Lord is close to the brokenhearted and saves those who are crushed in spirit.
Whoever believes in the Son has eternal life.
Above all else, guard your heart, for everything you do flows from it.
Therefore, if you have any encouragement from being united with Christ, if any comfort from his love... then make my joy complete by being like-minded.
You will keep in perfect peace those whose minds are steadfast, because they trust in you.
For where two or three gather in my name, there am I with them.
And my God will supply every need of yours according to his riches in glory in Christ Jesus.
So if the Son sets you free, you will be free indeed.
In peace I will lie down and sleep, for you alone, O Lord, will keep me safe.
Do not be overcome by evil, but overcome evil with good.
The Lord your God is with you, the Mighty Warrior who saves. He will take great delight in you.
For the word of God is alive and active. Sharper than any double-edged sword...
And we know that the Son of God has come and has given us understanding...
The Lord is my shepherd; I shall not want.
Who shall separate us from the love of Christ?
You are the light of the world. A city set on a hill cannot be hidden.
I sought the Lord, and he answered me; he delivered me from all my fears.
Draw near to God, and he will draw near to you.
But he was pierced for our transgressions; he was crushed for our iniquities...
Commit your way to the Lord; trust in him, and he will act.
And whatever you do, in word or deed, do everything in the name of the Lord Jesus.
Have I not commanded you? Be strong and courageous. Do not be afraid...
For it is by grace you have been saved, through faith—and this is not from yourselves, it is the gift of God.
Let the peace of Christ rule in your hearts, since as members of one body you were called to peace. And be thankful.
The grass withers, the flower fades, but the word of our God will stand forever.
Come near to God and he will come near to you.
Do not store up for yourselves treasures on earth, where moth and rust destroy...
Be kind and compassionate to one another, forgiving each other, just as in Christ God forgave you.
The Lord is my light and my salvation—whom shall I fear?
Therefore encourage one another and build each other up, just as in fact you are doing.
Better is one day in your courts than a thousand elsewhere.
But seek first his kingdom and his righteousness, and all these things will be given to you as well.
A cheerful heart is good medicine, but a crushed spirit dries up the bones.
In the same way, let your light shine before others...
The name of the Lord is a fortified tower; the righteous run to it and are safe.
He will wipe away every tear from their eyes, and death shall be no more...
Let us hold unswervingly to the hope we profess, for he who promised is faithful.
Blessed are those who hunger and thirst for righteousness, for they shall be satisfied.
I have hidden your word in my heart that I might not sin against you.
For the Lord your God goes with you; he will never leave you nor forsake you.
Let your conversation be always full of grace, seasoned with salt...
The Lord is good to those whose hope is in him, to the one who seeks him.
So faith comes from hearing, and hearing through the word of Christ.
For our light and momentary troubles are achieving for us an eternal glory that far outweighs them all.
Let everything you do be done in love.
Train up a child in the way he should go; even when he is old he will not depart from it.
Fathers, do not provoke your children to anger, but bring them up in the discipline and instruction of the Lord.
Behold, children are a heritage from the Lord, the fruit of the womb a reward.
Discipline your son, and he will give you rest; he will give delight to your heart.
As a father shows compassion to his children, so the Lord shows compassion to those who fear him.
The righteous who walks in his integrity—blessed are his children after him!
Folly is bound up in the heart of a child, but the rod of discipline drives it far from him.
Grandchildren are the crown of the aged, and the glory of children is their fathers.
You shall teach them diligently to your children, and shall talk of them when you sit in your house...
Correct your son, and he will give you comfort; he will also delight your soul.
